notes: 🎮 private (carry) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 1-3 into a numbers advantage.
🎮 private (midlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
🎮 private (offlane) was alive but losing lane and pinned — with them stuck across the map, this was the wrong fight to start.
🎮 private (carry) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.
🎮 private (offlane) was alive and never joined — get them to the fight and the count changes.
🎮 private (carry) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.
🎮 private (offlane) was alive and never joined — get them to the fight and the count changes.
We took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
🎮 private (midlane) was dead — went down 41s earlier, so this was never a full-strength fight.
Their main damage was Howitzer (35k magical); 1/5 of us itemized magic resist — that hurt.
Enemy ran 4/5 on or near their meta core — they drafted and built optimally; match it.

coaching.headline: A clean 3-stack map win — towers 9–5, objectives 20–15. We took the structures and closed at 31 minutes.
coaching.team: This is the trio working: out-towered them 9–5 and converted the objective lead. Willy's Steel set the table (13 assists) and Xeebs' Serath carried the jungle. Cuban's Feng Mao did 25% less damage than his norm, but the map control covered it. Repeat this — control neutrals, convert to towers.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Nothing to fix — this is our template as a trio. Get Cuban's damage closer to his norm and it's a stomp.

perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Steel support, 13 assists, 9–5 towers — elite enabling and Willy Guggenheim called the map. Five deaths is a touch high for a frontline tank.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Serath jungle, 7/6, into an unfavored Bayle matchup — controlled the jungle and the objectives anyway, which set up the 9-5 tower lead.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Feng Mao offlane into a losing Khaimera (43%) — held a hard matchup, but Cuban Noobster's damage was 25% under the norm. Trade more once even.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Bayle Kingslayer (knockback), Howitzer Land Mine (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Zinx. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
synergy: Little hard CC on our side — we can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Vortex Grenade → Vaporize pierce → Rocket Dash reposition → Ventilate ult
ourKits.winCondition: reposition with Rocket Dash and unload Ventilate from safety
ourKits.passive: abilities grant AS + a triple-shot next basic
ourKits.playWith: a frontline to create his free-fire window
ourKits.playAgainst: he's mobile but squishy — CC through the dash, then burst

ourKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
ourKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
ourKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
ourKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
ourKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

ourKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
ourKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
ourKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
ourKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing the key CC

ourKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
ourKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
ourKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
ourKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
enemyKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
enemyKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
enemyKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Slow Grenades / Land Mine zone → R2000 Missile → Make It Rain ult
enemyKits.winCondition: wall off space with mines/grenades and rain artillery on a held enemy
enemyKits.playWith: CC and chokes that force enemies into his zones
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile turret — flank his mine zones, dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
enemyKits.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
